headline: Jim Cramer Wonders Whether It’s Time to Buy The TJX Companies (TJX)

headline: The TJX Companies, Inc. (TJX) Board Raises Quarterly Dividend
summary: The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) is one of the 15 Best Apparel Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 13, 2026, The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) increased its quarterly dividend by 13% to $0.48 per share, with the dividend payable on June 4, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 14, 2026. The increase follows […]

headline: Does Costco's 13% Dividend Hike Make the Stock a Buy Right Now?
summary: COST lifts the quarterly dividend 13.1% to $1.47, signaling robust cash flow, yet the hike alone may not justify an aggressive buy now.
